name: Mercenary First Contract
effect: Unlocks Tier 1. Choose a spell and 4 faction upgrades from any faction matching your alignment.

name: Mercenary Second Contract
effect: Unlocks Tier 2. Holy Crusaders (Good): increase assistants additively and multiplicatively based on spells cast this Era. Heresiarchs (Evil): multiplicatively increase Mana Regeneration based on Evil spell activity time this Reincarnation. Trade Lords (Neutral): increase Mana Regen and FC find chance based on offline time this Reincarnation.
formula: Crusaders Add: (2*x^0.5); Mult: (2*ln(1+x)^1.2)%; Heresiarchs: (30+0.7*x^0.7)%; Trade Lords: +(2.5*x^0.75)

name: Mercenary Third Contract
effect: Unlocks Tier 3 and a second spell slot from any faction.
